name: RugSense
description: The launch-lifecycle risk desk for Base. Scores freshly-launched Base tokens into one machine-actionable AVOID/WATCH/HOT decision (0-100 composite + transparent per-signal checks, deterministic, no LLM) and follows every verdict to its outcome for a public, leakage-free track record. Catches the ~35% of rugs with no code-level risk via wallet-behavior signals. Paid per call over x402 (USDC on Base); free verifiable track record.

skills.name: Quick token pre-screen
skills.description: Fast DexScreener-grade AVOID/WATCH/HOT score for one Base token ($0.005, x402).

skills.name: Deep token score
skills.description: Full safety+momentum score for one Base token incl. honeypot sim, holder/LP, Etherscan deployer/cluster ($0.03, x402).

skills.name: Scored launch feed
skills.description: Ranked feed of freshly-launched Base tokens with AVOID/WATCH/HOT decisions ($0.03, x402).

skills.name: Batch token score
skills.description: Pre-screen up to 20 Base tokens in one call ($0.10, x402).

skills.name: Lifecycle watch
skills.description: Register a token for 7-day monitoring; webhook on tier-change / rug-in-progress ($0.05, x402).

skills.name: Deployer dossier
skills.description: Accumulated reputation record for a deployer wallet incl. repeat-offender denylist ($0.02, x402).

skills.name: Verifiable track record
skills.description: Leakage-free, point-in-time hit rate of every verdict (FREE).

x-rugsense.note: registrations[] is populated after on-chain register() on the Base Identity Registry (0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432). Run scripts/register-8004.ts.
